records.ety: [OE. pere, OF. piere a stone, F. pierre, fr. L. petra, Gr. <?/. Cf. Petrify.]

defs: Any detached mass of masonry, whether insulated or supporting one side of an arch or lintel, as of a bridge; the piece of wall between two openings.
Any additional or auxiliary mass of masonry used to stiffen a wall. See Buttress.
A projecting wharf or landing place.
